name: instant-id
description: Make realistic images of real people instantly

canny_strength.description: Canny ControlNet strength, effective only if `enable_canny_controlnet` is true
canny_strength.title: Canny Strength

depth_strength.description: Depth ControlNet strength, effective only if `enable_depth_controlnet` is true
depth_strength.title: Depth Strength

disable_safety_checker.description: Disable safety checker for generated images
disable_safety_checker.title: Disable Safety Checker

enable_canny_controlnet.description: Enable Canny ControlNet, overrides strength if set to false
enable_canny_controlnet.title: Enable Canny Controlnet

enable_depth_controlnet.description: Enable Depth ControlNet, overrides strength if set to false
enable_depth_controlnet.title: Enable Depth Controlnet

enable_lcm.description: Enable Fast Inference with LCM (Latent Consistency Models) - speeds up inference steps, trade-off is the quality of the generated image. Performs better with close-up portrait face images
enable_lcm.title: Enable Lcm

enable_pose_controlnet.description: Enable Openpose ControlNet, overrides strength if set to false
enable_pose_controlnet.title: Enable Pose Controlnet

face_detection_input_height.description: Height of the input image for face detection
face_detection_input_height.title: Face Detection Input Height

face_detection_input_width.description: Width of the input image for face detection
face_detection_input_width.title: Face Detection Input Width

ip_adapter_scale.description: Scale for image adapter strength (for detail)
ip_adapter_scale.title: Ip Adapter Scale

lcm_guidance_scale.description: Only used when `enable_lcm` is set to True, Scale for classifier-free guidance when using LCM
lcm_guidance_scale.title: Lcm Guidance Scale

lcm_num_inference_steps.description: Only used when `enable_lcm` is set to True, Number of denoising steps when using LCM
lcm_num_inference_steps.title: Lcm Num Inference Steps

output_quality.description: Quality of the output images, from 0 to 100. 100 is best quality, 0 is lowest quality.
output_quality.title: Output Quality

pose_strength.description: Openpose ControlNet strength, effective only if `enable_pose_controlnet` is true
pose_strength.title: Pose Strength

sdxl_weights.description: Pick which base weights you want to use
sdxl_weights.title: sdxl_weights

seed.description: Random seed. Leave blank to randomize the seed
seed.title: Seed
